full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0877 version 3: owner refined the dashboard control-plane concept with executable policy projection. The updated planning record states that conditional behavior-defining Markdown should be reduced by product-controlled scripts that generate narrow subject-specific AI-facing files from canonical GT-KB policy records, with source hashes, authority metadata, audit logs, reversibility, and tests proving mandatory subject/root/GOV enforcement text is retained.
explicit_change_request: Owner observed that behavior-defining Markdown forces the AI to choose among conditional instructions and increases context overhead, and proposed executable scripts outside application-session control to add or remove content for stronger enforcement and lower token use.
change_reason: Update the GT-KB/application isolation phased planning record to include executable projection of behavior-defining Markdown as part of the dashboard/control-plane phase and work-subject enforcement plan.
